title: Add ZcashClient import
description: Import the generated ZcashClient at the top of your main module.
beforeCode:
from bitcoin.rpc import RawProxy
proxy = RawProxy(port=18332)
afterCode:
from zcash_rpc import ZcashClient
client = ZcashClient(zebra_port=8232, zkool_port=8000)
# account_id = client.wallet.create_account("main", seed, pools=7)
notes: This replaces the Bitcoin RPC connection with ZcashClient (zebrad + zkool).

title: Configure Zcash node connection
description: Set zebrad and zkool connection details.
notes: Adjust host/port if your nodes are remote. zebrad = chain data, zkool = wallet operations.
